_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the Send SMTP Mail Message port/transport-security mismatch sub-case (Branch 3 of send-smtp-mail-failures); mock dispatcher only. The activity targets port 465 with SecureConnection=StartTls; 465 is implicit SSL, so the STARTTLS negotiation fails and the connection is dropped (SmtpException wrapping a socket/handshake error). docsai proxied; --level Error rule precedes the generic logs rule. Token-aware matching, first match wins.
